title: Korak 8

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import string

# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

print(all_characters)
challengeFiles.seed:
import string

# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

print(all_characters)

description:
Uobičajena praksa je stavljanje deklaracija import iznad vašeg koda. Štaviše, ako postoji više deklaracija import, organizujte ih po abecednom redosledu radi poboljšanja čitljivosti.

Iznad vašeg koda, import modul za random.
